specific_location: Bear Creek Lake Park in the shrubby area east of Fitnes #1 Station.
description: The bird was in a mixed flock of Brewer's and Chipping sparrows (40-50) and popped up on the outer edge of some rabbitbrush for a short while enabling us to get a good look at the bird. It had clean buffy colors including a buffy supercilium, distinct auricular patch, white malar area and buffy sides.Behaviors: The mixed flock of sparrows was feeding on the ground and in and around the dense rabbitbrush and scrub willow. The bird popped up for a few seconds and gave us a good look.Call: n/aPlumage: Adult non-breeding
